description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Boca Meatless Burgers, prominently featuring the brand name in large, white and yellow script on a red background. The front of the box displays an appetizing image of a cooked meatless burger patty served on a bun with visible toppings such as lettuce, tomato, and onion, placed on a white plate. The packaging highlights that it contains 16 big burgers and emphasizes the 'Original' flavor. Nutritional or promotional information is visible in blue and green accents, and the box is sealed, indicating the burgers are frozen. The sides of the box repeat the branding and burger imagery, with some text and graphics partially visible. The overall appearance is colorful and designed to attract attention in a grocery or urban food retail setting.
description: A colorful rectangular box of Boca Meatless Burgers, featuring a vivid burger image and bold branding on a red background.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full Boca branding, a large burger image with toppings, and product details clearly.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the edge of the box with partial branding and a cropped burger image, less detail visible.
description_view_2: The rear view is nearly identical to the front, showing the same branding and burger image, but mirrored.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, with partial branding and a cropped burger image, minimal detail.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered beneath a slice of tomato, with rings of red onion placed on top, all arranged above the patty and beneath the top bun.
